next_steps: Browse https://meshcentral.hdc.dukk.org (or meshcentral.public_url) and create the first admin account.
Set vault secrets HDC_MESHCENTRAL_USERNAME and HDC_MESHCENTRAL_PASSWORD for the MeshCentral API account.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/meshcentral-a.json from query --live ct_ip.
Install agents using the public URL; TLS is terminated at nginx-waf.
Run query --import --yes to sync meshcentral.devices[] from live agents.
Run bind maintain and nginx-waf maintain if DNS or proxy config changed.
